# ADR-0000: Decision Title

Use this template for architecture decisions and documentation policy decisions.

## Status

Proposed

## Context

Explain the situation, constraints, and forces behind the decision.

## Decision

State the decision clearly.

## Consequences

Describe the benefits, trade-offs, and maintenance cost.
